(404/MAS) PARTIES IN PRO PER. PARTIES PREVIOUSLY ATTENDED MEDIATION WITH KAREN BURNS OF FCS. PARTIES SWORN AND TESTIFIED. COURT INFORMS RESP OF HIS RIGHTS AS HE HAS PEN
DING CRIMINAL ACTION IN RELATED MATTER. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, COURT ORDERS TRANSFER OF VENUE TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY. PARTIES TO EQUALLY SHARE
LY, THEIR RESIDENCE, PET'S PLACE OF WORK, PET'S VEHICLE, CHILDREN'S SCHOOL AND PLACE OF CHILD CARE. FIREARM RESTRICTION/RELINQUISHMENT APPLIES.
E CURRENTLY LIVES IN IDAHO. COURT ORDERS RESP SHALL TEMPORARILY HAVE NO C/V (SUPERVISED OR OTHERWISE) WITH KYLE NOR KELLY. RESP REQUIRED TO WORK WITH
NORMA REAY #1520
**CASE TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT**

(NOTES)...CASE FILE REJECTED IN CONTRA COSTA SUPERIOR COURT FOR REJECTION OF IFP APPLICATION / LACK OF FEES. ALTHOUGH THE ORDER STATES THAT TRANSFER FEES ARE TO BE SHARED EQUALLY BY BOTH PARTIES, CONTRA COSTA WAS CONTACTED AND EXPLAINED TO THAT THE CASE WAS INITIATED AS AND IS CURRENTLY A DOMESTIC VIOLENCE CASE. CLARIFICATION WILL BE OBTAINED AS TO THE FEES AND WILL REMAIN IN SAN FRANCISCO UNTIL EITHER FEES ARE PAID OR CLARIFICATION THAT NO FEES ARE REQUIRED FOR THIS DOMESTIC VIOL. CASE. (KML)
**CASE FILE RE-TRANSMITTED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT WITH NEWLY COMPLETED FEE WAIVER APPLICATION ATTACHED**
